name: labault
description: Labault's Claude Code marketplace — opinionated PHP/Symfony plugins built from real production workflows, not generated filler.

plugins.name: symfony-forge
plugins.description: Scaffold and harden Symfony projects the Labault way: strict quality baseline (PHPStan level 9, Rector, PHP-CS-Fixer), pre-commit hooks, and a Symfony-aware code reviewer.
